caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide discussing the project status of Fluentbit, specifically focusing on its adoption as of October 2020. The slide highlights the significant growth in deployments over the past few years, with a clear upward trend illustrated by a graph. In 2018, there were 18 million deployments, which increased to 62 million in 2019, and further surged to an impressive 170 million in 2020. This exponential growth is visually represented by a rising line graph, emphasizing the rapid adoption and success of Fluentbit. The presenter, visible in a small inset window, seems to be explaining these statistics, likely providing additional context or insights into the factors contributing to this substantial increase in deployments.
